title: Use a Lookup Field in Workflows
excerpt: It would be very helpful to allow workflows to use lookup fields as a data source. For instance, a customer’s renewal must be sent a specific number of months prior to their contract expiration.  That number can be saved…

posts.author: becca_colesoft (Becca C)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very helpful to allow workflows to use lookup fields as a data source. For instance, a customer’s renewal must be sent a specific number of months prior to their contract expiration. That number can be saved on the customer/company level, rather than needing to be included as a separate data point for every deal. However, currently, that number cannot be used to push a date in a workflow even if the lookup field is included in the table.
